title: Thumbelina
description: This is a player through the control of a small plane, by hitting the sprinkler to water plants, by throwing bombs to eliminate pests to get points, after finishing the game to get plants or pests in Chinese and English pronunciation and spelling as a reward.
description_short: A flight game, the player through the direction of the keys to control the flight, with individual keys for the action of the bomb. I think maybe learning to read and write Chinese/English will be a feature. It is worth mentioning that this game was developed by the author alone.
